title: elaeocarpus amboinensis
intro: Elaeocarpus amboinensis, also known as the blue marble tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus amboinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anticancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and its leaves and bark are also used in herbal remedies.
